data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Multi-contact ownership on opportunities', but the evidence provided does not confirm this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for multi-contact ownership, yet there is no concrete evidence or endpoints provided that demonstrate the existence or functionality of this feature. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence provided, as the requirement is not covered by any of the prior steps or evidence.
gaps: No evidence of multi-contact ownership on opportunities.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the multi-contact ownership on opportunities.
